provenance.convoy_capacity_rations: researcher-imposed capacity interpretation anchored to the thesis-grounded 5,000-ration release batch
provenance.return_hours: researcher-imposed parsimonious extension under PI-delegated modeling autonomy
provenance.partial_loads: explicit departure from the thesis no-partial-delivery simplification

physics.hold_semantics: forfeit the current daily departure opportunity; convoy remains at Op7
physics.route_outage_semantics: outbound and return progress pause while Op8 is down

static_frontier.dispatch_rule: DISPATCH_NOW when threshold is met OR oldest staged inventory reaches maximum wait

observations: downstream backlog quantity and maximum age
convoy availability and nominal return ETA
time since departure and staging age
resource_ledger: convoy unavailable hours (outbound + return + route wait)

promotion.resource_comparison_primary: resource-dominance-constrained static comparator: for each candidate dynamic policy, select once on calibration the best static policy satisfying static departures <= candidate departures AND static unavailable_hours <= candidate unavailable_hours; freeze that comparator for holdout. If no eligible static comparator exists, no superiority claim is allowed.
promotion.resource_comparison_secondary: Report the joint ReT-service-loss-departures-vehicle-hours-load-factor Pareto frontier; Pareto non-dominance alone does not establish adaptive superiority.
